name.title: Name
name.description: A name to label this plugin

servers.title: Computers Running the OpenRGB SDK Server

host.title: Host
host.description: The IP address (e.g. 10.0.0.2) or hostname (e.g. my-computer.local) that the OpenRGB SDK Server is running on

port.title: Port
port.description: The port number that the OpenRGB SDK Server is set to run on

name.title: Device Name
name.description: Exact device name as reported by OpenRGB

whiteBalanceR.title: Red (0–255)
whiteBalanceR.description: Red channel multiplier. 255 = no change, lower values reduce red output.

whiteBalanceG.title: Green (0–255)
whiteBalanceG.description: Green channel multiplier. 255 = no change, lower values reduce green output.

whiteBalanceB.title: Blue (0–255)
whiteBalanceB.description: Blue channel multiplier. 255 = no change, lower values reduce blue output.

discoveryInterval.title: Discovery Interval
discoveryInterval.description: How often (in seconds) to check if new devices are available to connect to

preserveDisconnected.title: Preserve Disconnected Devices
preserveDisconnected.description: Enable this to have the plugin keep devices that are disconnected from their server. By default, devices that are not connected when their server is queried are removed from HomeKit, which may mess up your scenes if you have devices such as peripherals which are not always connected to your PC

suppressConnectionErrors.title: Suppress Connection Errors
suppressConnectionErrors.description: Enable this to hide log messages about errors connecting to your PC
